product_visual_description: Occhiali da sole smart in colorazione interamente nera. Montatura classica stile Wayfarer con frontale squadrato e aste spesse e robuste. Lenti scure polarizzate di colore grigio-nero uniforme. Le aste presentano un modulo tecnologico integrato sul lato destro (altoparlante aperto all'aria e pulsante touch), con finitura leggermente opaca e dettagli metallici argentati sulle cerniere. Materiale: combinazione di acciaio inossidabile, ABS e PC. Aspetto moderno, minimalista e fashion-tech. Nella foto reference è presente anche una mano che regge uno smartphone, da includere o escludere in base alla composizione richiesta.
global_rule:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photos of the Occhiali Smart Bluetooth GiDaCom.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTOS.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.

THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.

IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE FOR THIS JOB: LOGO_PROVIDED
- For images 02, 04, 06, 09: integrate the brand logo (SECOND image_input) bottom-right corner per LOGO INTEGRATION RULES.
- For images 01a, 01b, 03, 05, 07, 08: behave exactly as NO_LOGO — fill every corner with useful content, no reserved space.
NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER' or similar anywhere in the image.

ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN. Zero exceptions.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif (e.g. Montserrat Bold, Inter Black).

images.name: Hero Sfondo Bianco
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.

If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE: NO_LOGO for this image — fill every corner with useful content, no reserved space, no placeholder.
NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER' anywhere.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01A — HERO SFONDO BIANCO:
STEP 1 — EXTRACT PRODUCT CUTOUT:
From the reference photo, extract ONLY the sunglasses (the black Wayfarer-style smart glasses). Do NOT include the hand holding the smartphone. Isolate the glasses with a clean, precise cutout — no background residue, no halo, no fringe.
The glasses: classic black Wayfarer frame, thick black arms with integrated tech module on the right arm, dark gray polarized lenses, silver metal hinge detail. Pixel-perfect. Untouchable.

STEP 2 — PLACE ON WHITE BACKGROUND:
Background: pure white RGB(255,255,255). Absolutely flat. No gradient. No shadow. No vignette.
Place the glasses cutout centered horizontally, positioned slightly above center vertically (approximately 45% from top of canvas).
The glasses should occupy approximately 70% of the canvas width.
ANGLE: natural front-facing 3/4 view as in the reference.
Zero text. Zero logos. Zero icons. Zero effects. Zero empty placeholder areas.
This is the Amazon main image — clean white only.

images.name: Hero Con Effetto Sonic Burst
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photos of the Occhiali Smart Bluetooth GiDaCom.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTOS.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE: NO_LOGO for this image — fill every corner with useful content, no reserved space, no placeholder.
NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER' anywhere.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01B — HERO CON EFFETTO SONIC BURST:

STEP 1 — RENDER THE PRODUCT EXACTLY AS IN THE REFERENCE PHOTOS:
Extract ONLY the black smart sunglasses from the reference photo (exclude the hand and smartphone). Pixel-perfect cutout of the classic black Wayfarer-style frame with thick tech-integrated arms, dark polarized lenses, silver hinge details, speaker mesh visible on the right arm. Place the glasses large and centered on the canvas, occupying approximately 72% of canvas width, positioned at vertical center slightly above midpoint. The product looks exactly as in the reference photos. THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE. Treated as a completely separate layer — no effect from Step 2 may touch, overlap, or bleed onto it.
If any background effect bleeds onto the product — FAILURE.

STEP 2 — ADD SONIC BURST BACKGROUND EFFECT ONLY BEHIND THE PRODUCT:
Background base: deep dark navy-to-black radial gradient centered behind the glasses — from #0A1628 at edges to #050A14 at far corners.
ONLY in the area BEHIND and AROUND the product — NOT touching, NOT overlapping the glasses:
- Explosive concentric arc waves radiating outward from the center-bottom of the glasses, as if sound is emanating from the speaker on the arms. Arcs in cyan-electric blue (#00D4FF) and soft white (#E8F4FF), at varying opacity (20% to 60%), thin stroke (1-3px).
- Bluetooth symbol motif (large, faint, 8% opacity white) centered behind the glasses frame.
- Prismatic light scatter: fine particle dots (#00D4FF, #7B61FF, #FFFFFF) scattered in the upper quadrants behind the glasses, density decreasing toward edges.
- Thin horizontal speed lines in the bottom-left and bottom-right corners (#00D4FF at 15% opacity), suggesting wireless signal propagation.
- Faint circular frequency rings (like audio waveform cross-section) centered at the midpoint behind the lenses — stroked in #00D4FF at 10% opacity.
ALL effects stop at the product silhouette edge. Zero bleed onto the glasses.
NO text. NO logos. NO watermarks. NO empty reserved space.

NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER' anywhere.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 02 — BENEFIT PRINCIPALE:
Background: deep dark navy gradient #080C1A to #0F172A (top-left to bottom-right). Faint geometric hexagonal mesh pattern overlay at 4% white opacity covering the full canvas. Thin cyan accent line (#00D4FF, 2px) as a vertical separator at 55% from left edge, full canvas height.

LEFT 55% of canvas:
Place the glasses cutout (pixel-perfect from reference, exclude hand/phone) large, centered vertically. Glasses occupy approx. 90% of the left column width. Subtle soft shadow ONLY on the background behind the glasses (not on the glasses themselves) — dark navy drop shadow at 30% opacity to give depth. The glasses float naturally.

RIGHT 45% of canvas:
TOP of right column: heading text in white bold uppercase: 'AUDIO SMART
SENZA CUFFIE'
(two lines, 'AUDIO SMART' large ~72px, 'SENZA CUFFIE' in #00D4FF accent color, ~60px)
Below the heading, 5 benefit lines with #00D4FF checkmark (✓) followed by bold white text. Thin #1E293B separator line between each benefit. Benefit texts:
✓ Audio Bluetooth 5.0 stereo
✓ Controllo touch sul frontale
✓ Microfono integrato per chiamate
✓ Batteria fino a 7 ore
✓ Resistenza schizzi IP4

Font size for benefit text: approx. 40px bold white. Checkmark: 44px #00D4FF.
Right column background: same dark gradient, no separate fill.
Fill the entire canvas — no empty corners.

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

IMAGE 03 — SPECIFICHE TECNICHE · CONNETTIVITÀ & AUDIO:
Background: soft light gray gradient #F0F2F5 to #E2E8EF (top to bottom). Faint thin diagonal line pattern at 3% dark opacity across the full canvas (gives texture without busy feel). This is a LIGHT background — strong contrast with the dark glasses.

TOP SECTION (top 15% of canvas):
Full-width dark navy bar #0F172A with centered white bold text: 'SPECIFICHE TECNICHE' (~56px). Below it in #00D4FF: 'CONNETTIVITÀ & AUDIO' (~44px).

CENTER SECTION (middle 70% of canvas):
LEFT 45%: product glasses cutout (pixel-perfect, exclude hand/phone), centered vertically. Large, approx 85% of left column width. Glasses floating naturally on the light background.

RIGHT 55%: 2-column specification grid. Each spec is a dark navy pill/card #0F172A with cyan accent left border (4px #00D4FF). Inside each card: spec name in #00D4FF uppercase small (~28px) and value in white bold (~38px). Cards arranged vertically with 16px gap.
Spec cards (6 total, 2 visual columns):
[Card 1] 'BLUETOOTH' | '5.0'
[Card 2] 'PORTATA' | '10 metri'
[Card 3] 'BATTERIA' | '140 mAh'
[Card 4] 'AUTONOMIA' | '4 - 7 ore'
[Card 5] 'RICARICA' | '60 minuti'
[Card 6] 'CONTROLLO' | 'Touch'

BOTTOM SECTION (bottom 12% of canvas):
Full-width dark navy bar #0F172A. Centered white text bold: 'AUDIO STEREO DI ALTA QUALITÀ · CONNESSIONE STABILE'
(~36px, with a thin #00D4FF divider line above it).
Fill the entire 2000x2000 canvas. No empty corners.

Dark navy full-width bar #0F172A. Centered bold white: 'COME SI USA' (~58px). Below in cyan #00D4FF small caps: 'TRE SEMPLICI PASSI' (~36px).

TOP SECTION (top 12%):
Centered bold white text: 'ANATOMIA' (~56px). Below in #00D4FF: 'OCCHIALI SMART BLUETOOTH' (~38px). Thin full-width #00D4FF line (2px) below the subtitle.

CENTER SECTION (middle 76%):
Place the glasses cutout (pixel-perfect, exclude hand/phone) LARGE and centered — approximately 78% of canvas width. Positioned at vertical center of the section. The glasses are the focal element.

Callout arrows from specific points on the glasses to label pills. Callout lines: thin #00D4FF lines (1.5px) with small circular endpoint dot (#00D4FF, 6px). Label pills: small rounded rectangle with dark navy fill #0F172A and thin #00D4FF border (1.5px). Inside each pill: white bold text ~28px.

→ RIGHT ARM near ear: 'MICROFONO IN SILICONE' (silicone mic on right arm end)

→ LENS LEFT center: 'LENTE POLARIZZATA' (polarized lens)
→ HINGE AREA (right side): 'CERNIERA IN ACCIAIO' (stainless steel hinge)
→ TOP of frame (left arm top): 'PULSANTE ON/OFF' (if visible button)

BOTTOM SECTION (bottom 10%):
Thin #00D4FF line (2px) full width. Dark navy bar. White centered bold: 'DESIGN INGEGNERIZZATO PER IL COMFORT E LA QUALITÀ' (~32px).

IMAGE 07 — LIFESTYLE:

Her expression: relaxed confidence, slight natural smile, looking slightly off-camera. She is dressed casually-chic: light beige trench coat or white linen top. Her hair: loose, natural. She appears to be listening to music through the glasses — subtly natural, not staged.

Photography style: editorial fashion photography feel. Natural daylight, golden hour warmth. Bokeh depth of field on the background. High-end lifestyle magazine quality.

The glasses on her face come from the reference cutout — pixel-perfect, not redrawn or illustrated. Placed realistically on the face with correct perspective and scale.

NO text overlays. NO graphic elements. NO icons. NO logo space. NO empty placeholder areas. Pure lifestyle photography — full 2000x2000px frame filled with the scene.
Mood: genuine, aspirational, modern, tech-forward yet fashionable.

Icon: office / desk icon in #00D4FF.
Title bold white: 'IN UFFICIO' (~40px).
Subtext gray: 'Call e meeting discreti' (~28px).

BOTTOM SECTION (bottom 22%):
Center: glasses cutout (pixel-perfect, exclude hand/phone) centered, occupying ~55% of canvas width, floating above the bottom bar.
Below the glasses: thin #00D4FF separator line. Then bold white text centered: 'BLUETOOTH 5.0 · TOUCH CONTROL · IP4'
(~34px, each spec separated by '·' in #00D4FF).
Fill all 2000x2000px with content. No empty zones.

images.name: Garanzia e Trust
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photos of the Occhiali Smart Bluetooth GiDaCom.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTOS.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE: LOGO_PROVIDED — integrate brand logo (SECOND image_input) bottom-right per LOGO INTEGRATION RULES.
NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER' anywhere.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 09 — GARANZIA E TRUST:
Background: very dark charcoal #07090E full canvas. Faint radial gradient from center: #0D1117 at center, #07090E at edges. Subtle diagonal cross-hatch pattern at 3% #00D4FF opacity across entire canvas.
Thin #00D4FF border frame (3px) inset 20px from all 4 canvas edges — full perimeter accent frame.

TOP SECTION (top 14%):
Centered bold white uppercase: 'ACQUISTO PROTETTO' (~58px). Below in #00D4FF: 'IL TUO ACQUISTO È AL SICURO' (~34px). Thin full-width #00D4FF line (2px) beneath.

CENTER SECTION (middle 54%):
2x2 grid of 4 trust cards. Each card: ~44% canvas width, ~24% canvas height, with 3% gap. Card style: dark navy #0F172A bg, #00D4FF border (2px), rounded corners (16px).

Card 1 — TOP LEFT:
Icon: shield-check in #00D4FF (~70px).
Title bold white: 'GARANZIA 12 MESI' (~38px).
Subtext gray: 'Sostituzione garantita' (~26px).

Card 2 — TOP RIGHT:
Icon: truck/shipping in #00D4FF.
Title bold white: 'SPEDIZIONE RAPIDA' (~38px).
Subtext gray: 'Consegna veloce e sicura' (~26px).

Card 3 — BOTTOM LEFT:
Icon: award/certificate in #00D4FF.
Title bold white: 'QUALITÀ CERTIFICATA' (~38px).
Subtext gray: 'Standard premium IP4' (~26px).

Card 4 — BOTTOM RIGHT:
Icon: headset/support in #00D4FF.
Title bold white: 'ASSISTENZA CLIENTI' (~38px).
Subtext gray: 'Supporto dedicato' (~26px).

BOTTOM SECTION (bottom 28%):
Centered: glasses cutout (pixel-perfect, exclude hand/phone) placed large, approx 58% canvas width, floating naturally.
Below glasses: bold white centered text: 'SCEGLI LA QUALITÀ SMART' (~36px).
Below in #00D4FF: 'occhiali bluetooth · touch control · audio stereo' (~26px small caps).
Fill all 2000x2000px. No empty areas.

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

negative_prompt: No redrawn product. No illustrated or cartoon style product. No product recreated from scratch. No glow or color effect applied directly ON the product. No shape or proportion alteration of the product. No background effects touching, overlapping, or bleeding onto the product. No text in English (except brand names if inevitable). No supplier brand names or logos. No placeholder text like 'LOGO HERE', '[BRAND]', 'LOGO CLIENTE', 'YOUR LOGO', 'BRAND HERE'. No empty rectangular or circular space intentionally left blank for a logo. No watermarks, no signatures, no trademark symbols. Do not write the word 'LOGO' anywhere in the image. No smartphone or hand included unless explicitly requested by the specific image prompt. No artificial CGI look on the glasses — preserve photographic realism of the reference.
